26.text: Idolatry is entertaining or inventing something else on which to place our trust instead of, or beside, the one true God who has manifested himself in his Word.

9.text: The first commandment requireth us to know and acknowledge God to be the only true God, and our God; and to worship and glorify him accordingly.

The first commandment requireth us to know and acknowledge God to be the only true God, and our God; and to worship and glorify him accordingly.
            ( Deut. 6:4–5 ; 1 Chr. 28:9 )
